allow: Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/main\\.py - CERBERUS brain/main.py - Triple D brain/' -e 's/class Cerberus:/class TripleD:/' -e 's/\\[cerberus\\]/[triple-d]/g' -e 's/Cerberus\(\)\\.run\(\)/TripleD\(\).run\(\)/' triple-d/uno_q/main.py)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/CERBERUS - car-side firmware/Triple D - car-side firmware/' triple_d_car.ino triple-d/uno_r3/triple_d_car/triple_d_car.ino)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/CERBERUS - Uno Q \(Linux\)/Triple D - Uno Q \(Linux\)/' triple-d/uno_q/requirements.txt)
Bash(python3 -m py_compile car_client.py config.py decide.py defeat.py)
Bash(python3 -c "import config; print\('CAMERA_SOURCE =', repr\(config.CAMERA_SOURCE\)\); import car_client; print\('R4_IP =', car_client.R4_IP, 'PORT =', car_client.PORT\)")
